investments of $500 million and $250 million by the Equity Provider and funds advised by West Face, respectively
investments of $500 million and $250 million by the Equity Provider and funds advised by West Face, respectively

On July 28, 2013, Hudson’s Bay entered into an equity investment agreement (the “Teachers’ Investment Agreement”) with Teachers’ and the Equity Provider, pursuant to which Hudson’s Bay agreed to issue an aggregate of up to the Canadian dollar equivalent of $500 million of Hudson’s Bay’s common shares
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: Teachers’ Investment Agreement equity financing involving issuance of up to the Canadian dollar equivalent of $500 million of Hudson’s Bay common shares

quote_texts: Pursuant to the Teachers’ Investment Agreement, Teachers’ is providing to Hudson’s Bay a guarantee of the Equity Provider’s obligation to pay the aggregate purchase price for the Hudson’s Bay common shares and warrants to be issued to the Equity Provider thereunder.
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: guarantee of the Equity Provider’s obligation to pay the aggregate purchase price

quote_texts: Hudson’s Bay has informed us that on July 28, 2013, Hudson’s Bay also entered into an equity investment agreement (the “West Face Investment Agreement” and, together with the Teachers’ Investment Agreement, the “Equity Investment Agreements”) with funds advised by West Face pursuant to which Hudson’s Bay agreed to issue an aggregate of up to the Canadian dollar equivalent of $250 million of Hudson’s Bay common shares
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: West Face Investment Agreement equity financing involving issuance of up to the Canadian dollar equivalent of $250 million of Hudson’s Bay common shares

quote_texts: The respective obligations of each of the HB Investors to provide financing under the applicable Equity Investment Agreements are subject to certain conditions
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: obligations to provide financing under the applicable Equity Investment Agreements

event_claims.description: Hudson’s Bay entered into the Teachers’ Investment Agreement with Teachers’ and the Equity Provider for an equity investment involving issuance of up to the Canadian dollar equivalent of $500 million of Hudson’s Bay common shares.
quote_texts: On July 28, 2013, Hudson’s Bay entered into an equity investment agreement (the “Teachers’ Investment Agreement”) with Teachers’ and the Equity Provider, pursuant to which Hudson’s Bay agreed to issue an aggregate of up to the Canadian dollar equivalent of $500 million of Hudson’s Bay’s common shares

event_claims.description: Teachers’ provided Hudson’s Bay a guarantee of the Equity Provider’s obligation to pay the aggregate purchase price under the Teachers’ Investment Agreement.
quote_texts: Pursuant to the Teachers’ Investment Agreement, Teachers’ is providing to Hudson’s Bay a guarantee of the Equity Provider’s obligation to pay the aggregate purchase price for the Hudson’s Bay common shares and warrants to be issued to the Equity Provider thereunder.

event_claims.description: Hudson’s Bay entered into the West Face Investment Agreement with funds advised by West Face for an equity investment involving issuance of up to the Canadian dollar equivalent of $250 million of Hudson’s Bay common shares.
quote_texts: Hudson’s Bay has informed us that on July 28, 2013, Hudson’s Bay also entered into an equity investment agreement (the “West Face Investment Agreement” and, together with the Teachers’ Investment Agreement, the “Equity Investment Agreements”) with funds advised by West Face pursuant to which Hudson’s Bay agreed to issue an aggregate of up to the Canadian dollar equivalent of $250 million of Hudson’s Bay common shares

event_claims.description: Hudson’s Bay closed an underwritten prospectus offering of subscription receipts, raising gross proceeds of CDN $275.3 million.
quote_texts: Hudson’s Bay has informed us that on September 10, 2013, Hudson’s Bay closed its underwritten prospectus offering of 16,050,000 subscription receipts at a price of CDN $17.15 per subscription receipt raising gross proceeds of CDN $275.3 million.

event_claims.description: Hudson’s Bay obtained a debt commitment letter under which the Lenders agreed to provide debt financing.
quote_texts: In connection with the entry into the merger agreement, Hudson’s Bay obtained a debt commitment letter (the “debt commitment letter”), pursuant to which Bank of America, N.A. and Royal Bank of Canada (and, in some cases, certain of their affiliates) (collectively, the “Lenders”) have agreed to provide debt financing

event_claims.description: The debt commitment letter obtained by Hudson’s Bay at execution of the merger agreement remained in effect and unmodified.
quote_texts: However, the debt commitment letter obtained by Hudson’s Bay at the time of execution of the merger agreement remains in effect and unmodified.
